title: bupleurum gramineum var. orbelicum
intro: Bupleurum gramineum var. orbelicum, also known as Orbelian small umbrella plant, is a perennial herb belonging to the carrot family (Apiaceae). It has been traditionally used in folk medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Bupleurum gramineum var. orbelicum include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate pain and inflammation, and support the immune system, making it a popular remedy for various health conditions. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
